steps.t: You have arrived close to the main gates of Gundabad. You should talk to Ausma.
Follow Ausma as she sneaks towards the main gates of Gundabad. Watch out for Orc patrols!
You have been spotted by a patrolling Orc! You should defeat the patrol before they alert the others!
You have successfully defeated the Orcs before they alerted the rest of the enemy forces. You should talk to Ausma.
Follow Ausma as she sneaks towards the main gates of Gundabad. Watch out for Orc patrols!
Ausma has stopped to overhear the Orcs talking. You should stay out of sight and listen to the Orcs.
You have been sniffed out by a warg! You should defeat the attackers before they alert the others!
You are near the gates of Gundabad. You should follow Ausma.
You have successfully scouted the main gates without alerting the Orcs. You should talk to Ausma.
